claim: Fusion Chain combines multiple independent reasoning chains to improve LLM output consistency and quality
actionable: Run multiple independent reasoning passes on the same prompt and aggregate results; use voting or consensus to select the best answer
source_title: Fusion Chain: NEED the BEST Prompt Results at ANY COST? Watch this…

claim: Using a stronger model with better prompt engineering often yields better results than multiple calls to cheaper models
actionable: For critical tasks, invest in a single well-crafted prompt to a capable model rather than multiple cheaper API calls
source_title: Fusion Chain: NEED the BEST Prompt Results at ANY COST? Watch this…
